zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth de Namur於大約1095年出生在比利時納姆爾時，她的父親Godfrey de Namur30歲，母親Sibylle de Chateau-Porcien26歲。她與Gervais Count of Rethel在法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯雷特爾結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1149年享年55歲，埋葬在法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯雷特爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth de Namur于大约1095年出生在比利时納姆爾时，她的父亲Godfrey de Namur30岁，母亲Sibylle de Chateau-Porcien26岁。她与Gervais Count of Rethel在法国哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯雷特爾结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1149年享年55岁，埋葬在法国哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯雷特爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth de Namur was born about 1095, in Namur, Belgium, her father, Godfrey de Namur, was 30 and her mother, Sibylle de Chateau-Porcien, was 26. She married Gervais Count of Rethel in Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died in 1149, at the age of 55, and was buried in Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth de Namur est née environ 1095, à Namur, Belgique, son père, Godfrey de Namur, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Sibylle de Chateau-Porcien, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Gervais Count of Rethel à Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1149, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth de Namur um 1095 in Namen, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Godfrey de Namur 30 und ihre Mutter Sibylle de Chateau-Porcien 26. Sie hat in Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich Gervais Count of Rethel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1149 im Alter von 55 Jahren und wurde in Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth de Namur è nata il circa 1095 nel Namur, Belgio, sua padre, Godfrey de Namur, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Sibylle de Chateau-Porcien, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Gervais Count of Rethel nel Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel 1149, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth de Namurが約1095年にベルギーナムルで生まれた時，父Godfrey de Namurは30歳，母Sibylle de Chateau-Porcienは26歳であった。フランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアルデンスレスエルでGervais Count of Rethelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1149年に55歳で死去し，フランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアルデンスレスエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth de Namur(이)가 대략 1095년 벨기에 남어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Godfrey de Namur(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sibylle de Chateau-Porcien(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 아데네스 레테에서 Gervais Count of Rethel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1149년 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 아데네스 레테에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth de Namur nasceu aproximadamente 1095, em Namur, Bélgica, seu pai, Godfrey de Namur, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Sibylle de Chateau-Porcien, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Gervais Count of Rethel em Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1149, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth de Namur родилась около 1095 г. в местности намур, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Godfrey de Namur было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Sibylle de Chateau-Porcien, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gervais Count of Rethel в местности ретел, арденнесь, чампагне-арденн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1149 г. в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности ретел, арденнесь, чампагне-арденн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth de Namur nació aproximadamente 1095, en Namur, Bélgica, su papá, Godfrey de Namur, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Sibylle de Chateau-Porcien, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Gervais Count of Rethel en Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en 1149, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.
